svg.title: Enterprise Digital Banking System — Architecture & UML Diagram
svg.desc: A layered architecture diagram showing controllers, services, repositories, entities, and their relationships in a Spring Boot banking system.

g.text: Repository Layer (Spring Data JPA — extends JpaRepository)
Entity Layer (@Entity — JPA mapped to DB tables)
DTOs (Request/Response): LoginRequest · AccountResponse · PaymentRequest · LoanResponse · ApiResponse<T>
Enums: AccountType · AccountStatus · TransactionType · LoanStatus · PaymentMode · KycStatus · CardType
Config: SecurityConfig · RedisConfig · KafkaConfig · AsyncConfig · OpenApiConfig · JpaConfig
Utils: EncryptionUtil · MaskingUtil · AccountNumberGenerator · EmiCalculatorUtil · ValidationUtil

svg.text: Click any box to learn more about that component
